title: anogramma ascensionis
intro: Anogramma ascensionis, also known as the Ascension Island Club Moss, is a rare species of club moss native to the island of Ascension in the South Atlantic Ocean. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Anogramma ascensionis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Anogramma ascensionis typically involve infusions, tinctures, or ointments made from the plant's leaves or stems, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
